message:
fix(model): parse thinking-level suffix before ad-hoc model creation

Fix model pattern parsing to strip a valid thinking-level suffix (e.g.
:high, :low) BEFORE falling through to ad_hoc_model_entry(). Previously,
a pattern like `provider/model:high` would reach the ad-hoc path which
would create a model entry with id `model:high` (the colon treated as
part of the model name) instead of correctly creating `model` with
thinking_level=High.

The fix moves the thinking-level suffix check to the top of
parse_model_pattern() so it is evaluated before any fallback logic. If
stripping the suffix yields a valid model match, the result carries the
parsed thinking level. If the suffix is NOT a valid thinking level, the
existing fallback warning path handles it as before.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
